name: ANAPTYSBIO, INC
business: AnaptysBio is a clinical-stage biotechnology company focused on delivering innovative immunology therapeutics for autoimmune and inflammatory diseases. Its wholly-owned pipeline includes rosnilimab, ANB033, and ANB101. The company also out-licensed therapeutic antibodies to GSK (Jemperli) and Vanda (imsidolimab), from which it recognizes milestone and royalty revenue.
sellsTo: patients with autoimmune and inflammatory diseases (target market)

exposures.sentence: We are a clinical-stage biotechnology company focused on delivering innovative immunology therapeutics for autoimmune and inflammatory diseases.

catalysts.event: Completion of proposed separation into two independent companies
catalysts.sentence: Upon completion of the proposed separation, which we expect to complete in the second quarter of 2026, we intend to launch the clinical-stage biotechnology company with adequate capital to fund operations for at least twelve months after the date the proposed separation is completed.

catalysts.event: FDA target action date for imsidolimab BLA in generalized pustular psoriasis
catalysts.sentence: The FDA accepted the BLA filing for imsidolimab in GPP in February 2026 with a target action date of December 12, 2026.

catalysts.event: Update on Phase 3 advancement for rosnilimab
catalysts.sentence: We expect to provide an update on Phase 3 advancement in the first half of 2026.
